metadata.title: KWERK - Exceptional Workspaces
metadata.description: Exceptional workspaces in the heart of Paris 8th arrondissement. Private offices, signature suites and full floors in a unique setting.

hero.title: Exceptional Workspaces
hero.subtitle: Exceptional workspaces in the heart of Paris' 8th arrondissement

locations.title: Our addresses
locations.subtitle: Four exceptional addresses in the 8th arrondissement

saint-honore.name: Saint-Honore
saint-honore.description: Our flagship 6,100 sq m space, with a 360° panoramic rooftop, Dana restaurant and 3 sport studios.
saint-honore.highlights: 360° Rooftop (150 ppl), Dana Restaurant, 3 Sport Studios, Barista, Spa & Wellness

messine.name: Messine
messine.description: 4,300 sq m of elegance with 2 rooftops, 2 saunas and a unique flotation cabin.
messine.highlights: 2 Rooftops (100 ppl), 2 Saunas, Flotation Cabin, Barista

madeleine.name: Madeleine
madeleine.description: 5,600 sq m with a 120-seat conference center and 2 sport studios.
madeleine.highlights: Conference Center (120 ppl), 2 Sport Studios, Barista, Wellness

haussmann.name: Haussmann
haussmann.description: 4,200 sq m of biophilic design with 3 modular meeting rooms.
haussmann.highlights: 3 Meeting Rooms (10-40 ppl), Biophilic Design, Barista

executive.label: Turn-key spaces
executive.name: Executive Offices
executive.description: Intimate, light-filled offices designed to welcome you in an elegant and serene setting. Each space combines comfort, discretion and confidentiality, with premium furniture and included services.

suites.label: Bespoke identity
suites.name: Signature Suites
suites.description: Fully customizable suites combining reception areas, private lounges and meeting rooms. A unique identity, private access and dedicated services for teams seeking high-end representation.

floors.label: Modular floors
floors.name: Private Floors
floors.description: Entirely private floors, configurable to your needs, integrating reception areas, collaborative zones, phone booths and private terraces. The solution for companies seeking total exclusivity and confidentiality.

dana.name: Dana Restaurant
dana.description: Healthy and gourmet cuisine, freshly prepared daily by our chef. Daily menu, vegetarian options and floor delivery.

barista.name: Barista
barista.description: An in-house professional barista for specialty coffees, teas and hot beverages throughout the day.

sport.name: Sport
sport.description: Over 40 classes per week: yoga, pilates, boxing, HIIT, meditation. Equipped studios and certified coaches.

wellness.name: Wellness
wellness.description: Spa, saunas, flotation cabin and treatments by appointment. A wellness space to recharge body and mind.

events.title: Events
events.subtitle: We design and support your professional or personal events, with a bespoke approach and a constant pursuit of excellence in execution.
events.experienceDescription: To enrich your moments, we offer unique culinary experiences (ice rolls, show cooking, cocktail bars) and a variety of entertainment: team building, creative workshops, DJs, shows or photo booths. With comprehensive support in scenography, technical production and entertainment, we make your event a unique and memorable experience.
events.detailDescription: We create immersive atmospheres with scenographers, decorators and artisans, and handle technical production (sound, lighting, video). Our carefully designed sets, bespoke lighting and the expertise of our qualified technicians ensure an exceptional service.

scenography.name: Scenography and decoration
scenography.items: Creation of thematic and immersive atmospheres.|Support from a dedicated scenography team for your event.

technical.name: Technical production and staging
technical.items: Technical management (sound, lighting, video) tailored to each project.|Creation of scenic sets and bespoke lighting.

entertainment.name: Entertainment and interactivity
entertainment.items: Culinary experiences: ice rolls, live show cooking, personalised cocktail bars.|Fun and artistic entertainment: team building activities, creative and cooperative workshops.|Unique performances: DJs, visual shows, photo booths.

contact.title: Contact us
contact.subtitle: Plan a visit to our spaces
contact.source: How did you hear about us?
contact.success: Message sent successfully! We will get back to you shortly.
contact.error: An error occurred. Please try again or contact us directly.

footer.description: Exceptional workspaces in the heart of Paris.
